purpose: Hidden ScenicSpin route curation/review source. Only active candidates awaiting triage should appear in candidateRoutes; promoted entries belong in production catalogs and are summarized here for traceability.
legalPolicy: Link/embed official public streams only. Do not download, proxy, mirror, or rehost creator video files. Re-check embed availability, source authenticity, and platform/license terms during review and periodically after promotion.

mvpFeatured.rationale: Enough variety for demos and repeat use while each ride can be fully watched, embedded, and quality-checked.

v1Curated.rationale: Covers common durations, difficulty bands, regions, audio styles, and scenery without overwhelming browse UX.

longTermCatalog.range: 100-250 reviewed routes plus a larger candidate backlog
longTermCatalog.rationale: Hundreds are useful as reviewed depth/backlog, but the surfaced catalog should remain curated and searchable rather than a raw scrape.

statusDefinitions.candidate: Discovered public stream; metadata may be inferred and must be reviewed.
statusDefinitions.reviewed: Human verified source, embed playback, duration, quality, route/location, and legal stance.
statusDefinitions.featured: Top-quality reviewed route appropriate for production catalog/homepage.
statusDefinitions.rejected: Failed source, legal, embedding, safety, quality, duplication, or pacing checks.

curationTiers.backlog: Unreviewed candidates used for research and triage.
curationTiers.reviewed: Eligible for import into production catalog after product fit check.
curationTiers.featured: Small hand-picked set exposed prominently in production and retained here for curation traceability.

candidateSourceStrategy: Use creator/channel allowlists first: Virtual Cycling Workouts, Bike the World, Indoor Cycling Videos, Jerry's Scenic Indoor Cycling, Bike Ireland, Prowalk Tours, and similar official public creator channels.
Prefer long-form cycling POV/indoor-training videos with stable camera, route title/location, clear duration, and embed-friendly platform hosting.
Use YouTube/Vimeo oEmbed or platform APIs to confirm public stream metadata; do not treat search results alone as production-ready.
Deduplicate by video ID/source URL and by route/location to avoid multiple near-identical entries.
Review in batches of 20-30, promote only the best few per batch, and keep rejected reasons for future filters.
promotionCriteria: Official creator/public channel source, not a repost or compilation of unclear origin.
Route is scenic and bike-relevant with sufficient visual continuity for indoor riding.
Metadata is verified: route/location, duration, difficulty/terrain, audio, quality, and camera style.

Strong positive triage signals include about-30-minute duration, no ads/interruptions, high-quality video, and substantial view count; these speed review but do not replace source legitimacy, embed playback, and legal/platform safety checks.
Adds catalog diversity by geography, duration, difficulty, terrain, season, or audio style.

promotedArchiveSummary.reason: Review backlog contained only entries already promoted into the PedalScape production catalog, so candidateRoutes was cleared to keep hidden review mode focused on active triage.
promotedArchiveSummary.historicalTrace: Removed promoted candidate details remain available in git history before 2026-06-22 and the promoted route records now live in routes/catalog.json.
